name: geolibre-cli
description: Agent-native geospatial CLI and MCP server

scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/cli.js inspect test/fixtures/points.geojson && node dist/cli.js sql "SELECT * FROM test/fixtures/data.csv LIMIT 2" && node dist/cli.js convert test/fixtures/points.geojson --to parquet --output /tmp/geolibre-points.parquet
